plugins.name: aidd-overlay
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework with project-agnostic workflows: interactive codebase quiz (dig), memory maintenance (harvest, reconcile-normative), obsolescence detection (taste), prospective analysis (foresee), performance audits (data-optimize, web-optimize), and planning utilities (decompose, journey, changelog, end-plan, previously).

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian project management integration: export project memory and status reports to Obsidian-compatible format (project-status).

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JS knowledge provider: detects runtime (web/desktop), framework (Nuxt/Vue/Alpine/Vite/Astro), ORMs and capabilities, then emits a pivot manifeste. /sc-js:audit delegates code review to aidd-dev:reviewer using capability pivots as criteria. Perf pivots for web-optimize, data pivots for data-optimize.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python-specific skills and workflows (Django web + ORM + async).

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust-specific skills and workflows (Axum / Actix web + SQLx / Diesel data).

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase Firestore query limits, security rules, quota awareness, Auth listener cleanup, Hosting trailing slash and cache headers. Klaviyo API patterns: 2-step subscribe, 409→PATCH, lists, lazy loading. GTM Consent Mode v2: gtag() vs Array format, ensureGtag(), Meta Pixel consent, event taxonomy. Microsoft Clarity: best-effort model, consent-gated loading, queue init, dual push. PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse: PSI variance, deterministic metrics, Nuxt 3 perf checklist (LCP/CLS/INP/TBT/bundle/cache).
